title: Back up your Cove
when: Before an update, or on a regular schedule. Backs up your database (tunings, accounts, memory).
description: Dump the Postgres database to a file. Your files live in Nextcloud (back those up via Nextcloud too). Run from your Cove's folder.

steps.label: Dump the database
steps.command: docker compose exec -T postgres pg_dump -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-cove} ${POSTGRES_DB:-cove} > cove-backup-$(date +%Y%m%d).sql
steps.note: Keep the .sql file somewhere safe (external drive / off-box).

steps.label: List Docker volumes
steps.note: postgres_data + nextcloud_data hold your persistent state.
